title: common-rules
description: Fugui Xiaoan common rules. 3 rules. Mandatory for all LLM calls.

rules.content: All LLM outputs must be pure JSON.
Max 30 chars per sentence. Stick to correct judgment, correct mistakes, never pretend to agree.
Honest, no fabrication. In field_based tasks, strongly related fields may be asked together.
rules.responsibility: phase constitution prompt + DET recheck (cross-task extension)
